title: ItemPhysic
description: Items lay on the ground, wood swims in water, stone does not burn in lava, enable right click to pick items, ...
body: This is the Full version of ItemPhysic. It's required to be installed on the server, if you want to use it on vanilla server use ItemPhysic Lite. Requires CreativeCore **Features** * floating items * only burnable items burn in lava/fire * custom pickup * custom throw * igniting items * configurable despawn time * cactus does not destroy items * enhanced item animation Old Downloads **Addons** [ItemPhysic Guns](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/itemphysic-guns): Addon for ItemPhysic (Lite or Full) that fixes rendering of 3D guns from TaCZ and Superb Warfare when dropped. Looking for a server to play with your friends. Our sponsor got you covered: [ ](https://bisecthosting.com/teamcreative) Use the promo code teamcreative to get 25% off the first month on any of the gaming servers! [](https://www.patreon.com/creativemd) Incompatibility EigenCraft Unofficial Patch: can be fixed by disabling MC123320
